ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the recipient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the recipient */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the recipient belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the recipient */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the recipient within the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recipient was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the recipient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipients_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the survey belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (e.g., Draft, Active, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the response belongs to */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient who provided the response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being responded to */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the question (e.g., Yes, No, Other) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the response */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken by the recipient to respond (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES recipients ("recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, rating scale) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the question */,
  "options" TEXT /* Possible options for multiple-choice questions (JSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Manager, Recipient) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses_summary" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., Yes, No, Other) */,
  "response_count" INTEGER /* Count of responses of the specified type */,
  "average_response_time" REAL /* Average time taken to respond (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id", "question_id", "response_type")
)
